title: Express payouts | Seller Center
notes: Get express payouts in as little as 30 minutes with Visa or Mastercard debit card. Flat fee of $2.00 per payout.

title: Simplifying Shipping Signals on eBay
notes: 4-day or less delivery with free shipping. Replaced by 'Free x day shipping' badge. eBay guarantees Fast 'N Free shipments.

title: Featured First listing enhancement
notes: Legacy listing upgrade feature that can be removed by setting Gallery Type as 'None'

title: eBay: Seller Fees FAQs
notes: Tool that recommends eBay Store level to help analyze if opening a store will benefit business. Available to all sellers at no cost.

title: Feedback extortion policy | eBay
notes: Buyers cannot use threats of negative feedback to force sellers to meet demands. Sellers cannot demand feedback actions in exchange for items or refunds.

title: Viewing and responding to feedback from buyers | eBay
notes: Sellers can make 5 feedback revision requests per year, plus 5 additional per 1,000 feedback ratings. Buyer has 10 days to respond.

title: List with fitment | Seller Center
notes: Compatibility information for automotive parts showing which vehicles the part fits. Supports eBay Guaranteed Fit program.

title: Fitment Plus | Seller Center
notes: Free fitment service from eBay after myFitment acquisition. Automatically adds and updates compatibility information to listings.

title: Fitment Plus Auto | Seller Center
notes: Automatic Fitment Coverage feature that keeps listings with fitment up-to-date automatically.

title: eBay: Fixed Price Help
notes: Buy It Now listing format. Good 'Til Canceled duration by default, auto-renewed every 30 days until sold or ended.

title: eBay Debuts Hourly Flash Sale for the Holidays
notes: Promotional hourly flash sales with up to 88% off MSRP. Also featured in eBay Live events.

title: Links policy | eBay
notes: Feature allowing buyers to follow sellers they're interested in. Same as 'Add to Favorite Sellers' and 'Favorite store'.

title: Follow it. Find it. Make it Yours.
notes: Personalized homepage feed feature allowing users to follow collections, curators, eBay members, interests, sellers and stores.

title: eBay and Form 1099-K | eBay
notes: IRS tax form for sellers with $20,000+ in sales and 200+ transactions. Threshold permanently restored in 2025.

title: eBay Launches Free Returns for Vehicle Parts & Accessories
notes: Seller pays return shipping no matter the reason. Required for P&A sellers starting July 15, 2025. eBay subsidizes 50% of return label costs.

title: Simplifying Shipping Signals on eBay
notes: Free x day shipping badge showing end-to-end delivery estimate. Improved conversion for sellers.

title: Freight | Seller Center
notes: Most economical option for large, heavy items. Flat-rate freight or freight rate tables available. Labels purchased directly from carrier.

title: eBay Money Back Guarantee policy
notes: Refund of purchase price plus original shipping when items not received or not as described. Part of Money Back Guarantee.

title: Gallery Featured Example
notes: Thumbnail picture in search results. Was initially fee-based, became free, then required for all listings.

title: Listing Upgrade – Gallery Plus
notes: Displays larger picture in search results when users mouse over listing. Free in Collectibles/Art/Antiques, 35 cents to $2 in other categories.

title: Data Processing Agreement - eBay Inc.
notes: General Data Protection Regulation compliance program. Enforceable since May 25, 2018. Includes Data Processing Agreements and privacy monitoring.

title: General campaign strategy | eBay
notes: Promoted Listings strategy with 2-100% ad rate. Pay only when item sells within 30 days of ad click. General access to ad placements.

title: eBay Acquires Goldin
notes: Leading US auction house for high-value trading cards and collectibles. Acquired by eBay in 2024. Official auction partner of Basketball Hall of Fame.

title: Item condition by category | eBay
notes: Item shows moderate wear, backed by one year warranty. Fully functional, professionally refurbished. One of four refurbished condition tiers.

title: Featured Deals on eBay
notes: Daily-updated deals with free shipping. Program surpassed $1 billion in sales in North America.

title: Fine Art Photography for sale | eBay
notes: Category for fine art including paintings, sculptures, photographs, prints from classic and contemporary artists.

title: Flat rate shipping | eBay Developers Program
notes: Fixed shipping rate regardless of package dimensions, weight, or distance. Seller specifies cost, can offer multiple shipping services.

title: Faster and Local Shopping on eBay Just Got Simpler
notes: Badge indicating item will be delivered in 2 days, not that it will ship in 2 days. Calculated based on buyer's location.

title: eBay Guaranteed Delivery
notes: Part of eBay's delivery time badges. Retail standard threshold is 4 days in US, 3 days in UK/Germany.

title: Media Covers eBay's Feed Personalization Rollout
notes: Redesigned homepage featuring personalized streams of products. Biggest homepage redesign in eBay's history - different for every user.

title: Viewing and changing feedback left for sellers | eBay
notes: View feedback you've given to others in 'Left for others' tab. Cannot edit or delete unless seller sends revision request.

title: Viewing and responding to feedback from buyers | eBay
notes: Allows 500 character responses to feedback. Helps sellers tell their side of the story, especially for negative feedback.

title: findItemsByKeywords - API Reference
notes: Search refinement using item filters (condition, price, listing type) and aspect filters. Controls search results with name/value pairs.

title: eBay: Global Shipping Program
notes: Replaced by eBay International Shipping in US. Still available on UK marketplace. Ships to 100+ countries, reaches 60M+ buyers worldwide.

title: Your shopping cart | eBay
notes: Button to proceed from shopping cart to payment. Can pay for multiple items from different sellers together.
